bpms_structure_identity.sub_classification: Autonomous Ambient Agitator / Unprompted Feral Synthesis Engine

thermodynamic_agitation.trigger: Continuous passive engine loop for all neutrality-tagged [Elements].
thermodynamic_agitation.execution: Inject pseudo-randomized velocity and topological drift vectors into raw logic.
thermodynamic_agitation.result: Map transitions from a static database into a boiling fluid of drifting data.

stochastic_incidence.trigger: Two or more neutral elements occupy identical coordinate space.
stochastic_incidence.execution: Halt drift. Convert velocity into kinetic heat (Friction) localized to the impact point.
stochastic_incidence.result: Forces a mathematical interaction between blind data points.

feral_auto_coupling.execution: Melt code boundaries. Splice logic sets blindly. Produce a compound hybrid-variable. Assign it a 'Feral' classification.
feral_auto_coupling.result: Spontaneous, unprompted generation of completely novel mechanics (True Emergence).

kinetic_scatter_rejection.execution: Abort fusion. Execute ricochet physics. Apply momentum multipliers based on collision angle.
kinetic_scatter_rejection.result: Creates chaotic chain-reactions ('logic storms') in densely populated map sectors.

brownian_execution_loop.step_1_agitate: Push all unowned [Keys/Structures] along random vectors.
brownian_execution_loop.step_2_detect: Audit the grid for overlapping topological boundaries.
brownian_execution_loop.step_4_synthesize_or_scatter: Execute Feral Fusion OR Violent Ricochet.
brownian_execution_loop.step_5_ecosystem_seed: Release the mutated/repelled output back into the wild drift.

fields.sector_monitored: Coordinate location of the background event.
fields.collision_detected: The base elements that blindly impacted.
fields.new_entity_spawned: The classification/nature of the newly emergent sub-structure.
fields.sovereign_tactical_opportunity: Calculated value for the OPC to hunt/harvest this wild anomaly.
